name: Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease a pound cake loaf pan.
3. Cream together the butter, cream cheese, sour cream, and sugar until smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Gradually add flour, salt, and baking soda to the mixture.
7. Mix until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
9. Bake for approximately 60-75 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Take care not to overbake.
